Instead, it binds an off-chain encrypted evaluation process to a proposal-bound on-chain envelope that must be settled before the confidential payout can execute."}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","h2","h2-11",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"What REFHE payout plan"}],["$","li","l-29-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"encrypted input ciphertext hash"}],["$","li","l-29-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"evaluation policy hash"}],["$","li","l-29-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"evaluation key hash"}],["$","li","l-29-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"result ciphertext hash"}],["$","li","l-29-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"result commitment hash"}],["$","li","l-29-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proof bundle gating:"}],["$","li","l-29-13",{"className":"list-disc","children":"if a REFHE envelope exists for a confidential payout proposal, execution is blocked until the envelope is settled"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","h2","h2-32",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Why It Exists"}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","p","p-35",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Confidential payout plans already protect the employee-level manifest by keeping only hashes and aggregate settlement metadata on-chain."}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","p","p-37",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"REFHE upgrades that model by adding an authority-settled encrypted-evaluation step:"}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","ul","l-45",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-45-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"a confidential payout plan is configured on-chain"}],["$","li","l-45-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"a REFHE envelope is configured against that payout plan"}],["$","li","l-45-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"encrypted evaluation runs off-chain"}],["$","li","l-45-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the result bundle is settled on-chain by the DAO authority"}],["$","li","l-45-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the payout becomes executable only after the REFHE boundary is satisfied"}]]}]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17"]}]}]}]

9:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","ul","l-62",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-62-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"no REFHE envelope:"}],["$","li","l-62-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"confidential payout executes normally after proposal pass + timelock"}],["$","li","l-62-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"REFHE envelope exists but is not settled:"}],["$","li","l-62-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execution is rejected"}],["$","li","l-62-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"REFHE envelope is settled without a verifier program:"}],["$","li","l-62-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execution is rejected"}],["$","li","l-62-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"REFHE envelope is settled by the DAO authority with a verifier program:"}],["$","li","l-62-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execution may proceed once the proposal is executable"}]]}]}]

It does not claim that the PrivateDAO program re-executes or cryptographically verifies the REFHE computation on-chain."}]}]
